summary: Tested the new withdrawal icon feature in admin panel, driver wallet link fix, and wallet page cancel modal. All features working correctly. Fixed API endpoint bug in AdminPage.js (was using /admin/withdrawals instead of /payment/admin/withdrawals).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdminPage.js line 127 was calling /api/admin/withdrawals?status=pending but correct endpoint is /api/payment/admin/withdrawals?status=pending

Admin_5_Colored_Icons.notes: Found 5 buttons in pending approvals grid: بائعين (amber), منتجات (blue), سائقين (cyan), متاجر (green), سحب (purple)

Withdrawal_Icon_Navigation.notes: Clicking withdrawal icon navigates to ?tab=withdrawals and loads WithdrawalsTab component

No_Duplicate_Withdrawal_Link.notes: Verified البائعين والمنتجات section does NOT contain withdrawal link - only has: البائعين, المنتجات, الطلبات, العمولات, المطاعم, المتاجر المميزة, المخزون, بلاغات السعر, البلاغات

Driver_Wallet_Link.notes: DeliveryHomePage wallet link correctly points to /wallet (not /delivery/wallet). Wallet page loads at /wallet

Wallet_Cancel_Modal.notes: WalletPage.js uses cancelModal state and modal component (lines 117, 390-424) instead of window.confirm

Backend_Withdrawals_API.notes: GET /api/payment/admin/withdrawals?status=pending returns 200 with empty array (no pending withdrawals)

fixes_applied.issue: Wrong API endpoint for fetching pending withdrawals

context_for_next_testing_agent: All withdrawal-related features tested and working. Admin panel has 5 colored icons for pending approvals (sellers, products, drivers, stores, withdrawals). Driver wallet link correctly points to /wallet. WalletPage uses modal for cancel confirmation.
